basic_details.job_title: PGIMER Counselor/ Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Post Graduate Institute of Medical Education and Research Chandigarh (PGIMER)
basic_details.short_information: Post Graduate Institute of Medical Education and Research Chandigarh (PGIMER) has published the Counselor/ Nurse Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Counselor/ Nurse position on a contractual basis. Candidates up to 32 years of age holding a Bachelor of Science in Nursing (B.Sc. Nursing) are eligible to apply through email on or before 25 July 2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and application details below.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSc Nursing)
qualification.details: Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSc Nursing) with more than 2 years of experience in clinical nursing, preferably involving patient counselling and management of patients in OPD. Proficient in using Microsoft office (Word, Excel and PowerPoint).

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download PGIMER Counselor/ Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download PGIMER Counselor/ Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.post_graduate_institute_of_medical_educa: Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSc Nursing)

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Counselor/ Nurse Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the PGIMER Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download PGIMER Counselor/ Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

PGIMER Counselor/ Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSc Nursing) with more than 2 years of experience in clinical nursing, preferably involving patient counselling and management of patients in OPD. Proficient in using Microsoft office (Word, Excel and PowerPoint).

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PGIMER Counselor/ Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PGIMER Counselor/Nurse recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the PGIMER Counselor/Nurse position is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Counselor/Nurse post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSc Nursing) degree. Additionally, more than two years of experience in clinical nursing, with a preference for patient counselling and OPD management, is required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Counselor/Nurse position is 32 years. Please refer to the official notification for any age relaxation rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Counselor/Nurse position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 21,000 per month for the contractual period.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the PGIMER Counselor/Nurse job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Counselor/Nurse at PGIMER, Chandigarh.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Counselor/Nurse position will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted and called for an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What kind of experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates with more than two years of experience in clinical nursing are preferred. Experience in patient counselling and management of patients in an Outpatient Department (OPD) is particularly advantageous.

faq.question: Q10. What are the essential computer skills required?
faq.answer: Candidates must be proficient in using Microsoft Office applications, including Word, Excel, and PowerPoint, as part of the job requirements.
